creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Danilo G. Baio from comment #2)

Both changes mentioned are Approved by: portmgr (blanket, infrastructure) and don't require maintainer approval.

Also, setup.py doesnt mention setuptools in any *_requires, so can be removed as a BUILD_DEPENDS (additionally, but not an unconditional reason: python.mk adds setuptools already as a BUILD/RUN dependency)

Further, when adding a review to a bug, obsolete the patches (attachments), OR (more work) keep the attachments up to date. There should only ever be one (obvious) authoritative source of a changeset.

Obsoleted attachments are not deleted, so they can be viewed by anyone in the future if necessary.
